positive: Minimalist illustration of a friendly space sloth floating among abstract cosmic elements. The sloth should have a cheerful, sleepy expression, rendered in a clean, continuous line art style with flat block colors (pastel blues, lavender, mint green). Surrounded by simple, geometric nebula shapes and crescent moons. Composition must be centered and highly readable, optimized for apparel printing. Use strong contrast between the dark background and the light, stylized subject. Vector art aesthetic, symmetrical composition, UHD quality.
negative: blur, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poor detail, noisy, realistic photo, photograph, gradient, complex textures
